byMatthew Watkins

The United Family debuted its newest Market Street in Amarillo with a ribbon-cutting and store tours. (Courtesy: United Family)

AMARILLO, Texas (KVII) —The United Family debuted its newest Market Street in Amarillo with a ribbon-cutting and store tours.

The new store will open to the public on Wednesday at 6 a.m. at Coulter Street and S. Loop 335.

The ceremony was capped off by donations of $5,000 each to Special Olympics and the 100 Club of the Texas Panhandle.

"We are so proud to be associated with United Supermarkets," said Suzanne Talley, Executive Director of the 100 Club of the Texas Panhandle. "They are the epitome of community service and we are thankful to be a part of this today and be on the receiving end of a wonderful gift."

"It feels really awesome, it's like good to our community and our fellow athletes and gives us, like a lot to go compete in our events and stuff, so we're - I'm excited," Heather Handley, Special Olympics, said.

It is the 99th location for The United Family and the ninth in Amarillo.

In addition to many familiar services at a Market Street store, the new location will introduce new products and services.

“We are excited and proud to be opening this new location in the Amarillo community,” said Sidney Hopper, president of The United Family. “It is beautiful, spacious, and full of some of the best Market Street offers its guests. It is also especially meaningful to our company to expand our footprint in a community where we have been for so long.”

The store will be 80,350 square feet and include Taphouse 16, Chopsticks Noodle and Sushi Bar and debut theSMK’D BBQ brand in Amarillo.

Fernando Noriega, director of the new store and longtime Amarillo resident, said in addition to the new features and excellent products, guests can count on the outstanding service that is the foundation of the Market Street brand.

“I have been part of the Amarillo community for a long time, and I can’t wait to continue serving the community in this new store,” Noriega said. “This store has a lot of amazing things to offer, but I also promise great service will remain at the core of what we do. I know this team will do their best to make every day extraordinary for our guests.”

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: Ribbon-cutting hosted for newest United Market Street location in Amarillo
description: The United Family debuted its newest Market Street in Amarillo with a ribbon-cutting and store tours.The new store will open to the public on Wednesday at 6 a.m
